headline: Trump 🍊🤬 Calls Bibi 'Crazy' 🫨🫨 - Iran Deal GOES KABOOM 💥🧨
text: Donald 🍊👑 just went full DADDY MODE 📞😡 on Bibi Netty 🚀🇮🇱 after a WILD phone call that blew up the Iran talks like a TikTok drama! The Orange One straight up called the Israeli PM "EFFING CRAZY" 🫨💩 and said he was INGRATE AF 😤 for always beefing with Lebanon 🇱🇧💥 and throwing the US into a messy war with Tehran! Axios spilled the tea ☕📜 and Trump confirmed it on Pod Force One 🎙️😭, admitting he was "perturbed" 😩 but still kinda digs Bibi like a toxic situationship. Bibi laughed it off like a boss 😂🤷‍♂️ saying "families fight" but always make up before lunch, calling it "tactical disagreements" in the best bromance ever! Meanwhile Iran said PEACE OUT ✌️🚫 to US talks after Israel smacked Hezbollah targets, putting the whole ceasefire and Strait of Hormuz shipping lane at risk like a Jenga tower about to collapse! 😱🛳️ Trump wants to extend the Iran truce and maybe chat nuclear vibes but Bibi keeps doing his own dance 💃🕺, not vibing with White House priorities. Experts are like "here we go again" 🤦‍♂️ as Bibi has beefed with every president from Clinton's Oslo drama to Obama's surprise Congress speech and Biden's weapon shade. Even Joe Kent said the war was Israel lobby pressure and AIPAC clapped back with antisemitism shade! Pew poll shows 60% of Americans now side-eye Israel 🇮🇱👀, up from 42% pre-Hamas beef. Trump needs to create daylight between the US and Israel to keep MAGA happy and critics quiet. Their vibe was fire before but now everyone's wondering if this is a one-off or the start of a bigger breakup arc 💔📉. Bibi still calls Trump the "greatest friend to Israel" in history but one spicy call could flip the script faster than a Taylor Swift album drop! 🔥🎤
